title: Tiepie's Excalibur
description: This mod adds new ores and new weapons armors tools biomes dimensions and mobs
body:
This mod adds new ores and new weapons armors tools biomes dimensions and mobs


To Get True Excalibur You Need to first get Forgotten Gold Ore Piece What Is Obtantaned  From Forgotten Gold Ore
Then You Need To Smelt Down The Stone and Crystallization Off The Forgotten Gold Piece What will Get you Coil Gold. After Getting Coil Gold You Will Need to Craft Royal Gold What Can be Made in a  Smithing Table With The Following Ingredients (Coil Gold, Artorian, Closed EyeBlossom) After Crafting Royal Gold You Will Also Need To Craft The Golden Blade As Well. After Crafting The Golden Blade You Will Need To Craft Excaliburs Hilt. Then You Will Need One Last ingredient Four Nether Stars Then You Can Craft The True Excalibur.
